findings.title: Grandstream VoIP Phones — Unauthenticated Root RCE with Eavesdropping
findings.summary: Unauthenticated root RCE in Grandstream VoIP phones enables silent eavesdropping; no patch available.

findings.title: Microsoft Entra Accounts Targeted via Device Code + Vishing
findings.summary: Device code phishing combined with vishing bypasses MFA to compromise Microsoft Entra accounts across enterprise environments.

findings.title: Dell RecoverPoint — CISA Orders 3-Day Patch
findings.summary: CISA emergency 3-day directive confirms Chinese APT exploitation since mid-2024; 18+ month zero-day campaign.

findings.title: OpenSSL RCE Vulnerability Disclosed
findings.summary: New RCE in OpenSSL disclosed; details emerging but high impact given ubiquity across all encrypted services.

noted.summary: First Android malware to abuse Gemini AI at runtime for persistence. Mobile-only.
Targeting south Europe via IPTV app disguise. Mobile-only.
Texas sues over firmware vulnerabilities and Chinese hacking risks.
